dependencies.label: uname
dependencies.reason: Detects the host OS and architecture.

dependencies.label: mktemp
dependencies.reason: Creates a private temporary workspace for download and extraction.

dependencies.label: mkdir
dependencies.reason: Creates the install directory and the archive extraction directory.

dependencies.label: cp
dependencies.reason: Copies the extracted binary into the install directory.

dependencies.label: curl
dependencies.reason: Downloads release files from GitHub release assets.

dependencies.label: awk
dependencies.reason: Encodes URL path segments and looks up checksum entries.

dependencies.label: tr
dependencies.reason: Encodes URL path segments, canonicalizes OS names, and normalizes expected checksums to lowercase.

dependencies.label: ls
dependencies.reason: Lists downloaded and extracted files for diagnostics.

premises.label: POSIX-compatible sh
premises.description: this installer is executed under a POSIX-compatible sh runtime

premises.label: HTTPS access to GitHub release assets
premises.description: downloads the archive and checksum file from GitHub Releases

premises.label: Write permission to the install directory
premises.description: the installer writes the binary into the install directory
